title: Cilantro Tadka Delight
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish made with cilantro, tadka, and a few other ingredients. This recipe is quick and easy to make, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the tadka spice mix and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped cilantro and sauté for 1 minute.
Serve with naan or basmati rice.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of bliss for extra flavor.
